scene_title: Cavernas de Qumran sobre o Mar Morto
narrative_beat: Wide establisher of Qumran caves at dawn, rich crimson-gold sky, P&B rock and desert, tiny archaeologist figure at cave entrance

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide landscape of Qumran caves above the Dead Sea at dawn
subject.focal_point: a tiny archaeologist silhouette entering one of the caves at frame-right
subject.secondary: Rich crimson and gold dawn sky. Desaturated rock and desert. Wind drifting sand.

environment.location: the cliffs of Qumran over the Dead Sea

composition.rule: rule of thirds with caves at lower third
composition.foreground: sky in rich crimson, gold and ochre
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white rock, desert and Dead Sea

lighting.key_light: dawn gold directional light from camera-left

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
